name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests

description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, technology-gated infrastructure planning, station-owned defense perimeters, hidden proxy-gun ammo hardening, physical direct-acquisition target guarding, direct resource target/movement locking, movement vector enforcement, movement target reconciliation, and 0.1.653 cleanup for temporary repair interfaces.
